prompt:
Vertical 4:5 portrait social-media poster, GTA Vice City aesthetic redesign for the Muha Members Giveaway. The REFERENCE image is the locked typography / palette / Muha logo / layout anchor — reproduce its: ornate gold Muha 'M' crest logo at the top center, chrome-with-red-rim blocky GTA-style headline typography, red subtitle banner styling, QR code placement style, lighting mood, and overall Vice City neon-noir feel.

PALETTE — LOCKED: dominant CRIMSON / SCARLET RED (#B81020 / #E0202C / #FF2F3F gradients), deep black, wet-asphalt charcoal, warm gold accents on the Muha crest. ABSOLUTELY NO pink, NO magenta, NO teal, NO cyan, NO purple. The mood is hot-red Vice City — like the rest of the Muha campaign. The only saturated color in the whole image is red. White and gold are accents.

HEADER TEXT (replaces 'GET ON THE LIST'): rendered in the same chrome-and-red-rim blocky GTA Vice City typeface as the reference, all caps, perfectly horizontally centered, taking two stacked lines exactly like the reference: line 1 'GET IN', line 2 'THE LIST'. The phrase is 'GET IN THE LIST' — NOT 'GET ON THE LIST'.

SUBTITLE (replaces 'SCAN TO ENTER'): in the same red banner-bar styling as the reference, all caps, perfectly horizontally centered directly below the headline, reading exactly 'BECOME A MEMBER TODAY'. Same red bar background, white-stroked text, same proportions.

QR CODE: clean black-and-white square QR with a small white border, lower-middle of the poster — exactly like the reference. Adjacent small all-caps callout 'SCAN FOR APP' in chrome/red GTA style.

MUHA LOGO: at the very top center, ornate gold filigree Muha 'M' crest, exact match to reference.

BACKGROUND — NEW UNIQUE CONCEPT, ALL-RED PALETTE: a GTA Vice City VIP nightclub entrance at night. Show: a velvet-rope barrier with two glowing brass stanchions in the foreground, the rope itself in deep crimson; a chic doorway with a RED-NEON palm-tree silhouette sign above it; the words 'VICE CITY' subtly glowing in RED neon as part of the club facade (small, not competing with the headline); wet rain-slicked black asphalt and curb reflecting RED neon (no other colors in the reflections); a hint of palm fronds backlit in red; a soft distant Miami night skyline with warm red-orange ambient glow on the horizon; a couple of out-of-focus silhouettes of stylish nightclub-goers in the distance suggesting an exclusive line, lit from behind by red neon. Mood: opulent, exclusive, after-dark luxury — VIP entrance to a high-roller club. NO Dodge Challenger, NO stacks of cash, NO money piles anywhere.

Retain the reference's grain / halation / cinematic finish. Sharp focus on the headline, subtitle, QR, and Muha logo; background is atmospheric with shallow depth-of-field. Photorealistic but stylized like a high-end editorial movie poster. No additional text beyond what's specified above.
refImages: Muha Giveaway Redesigned/Final/Get on the List.png
